vulnerablePopulations: patients with limited access to psychotherapy
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; clinical assessment with exclusion of medical mimics; somatic presentations are common

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to treatment gap and limited CBT access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care identification variable; psychiatric care concentrated in urban tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: SSRIs/SNRIs + CBT where available; short-term benzodiazepines in selected cases; telepsychiatry expanding
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High stigma, mental health professional scarcity, and high out-of-pocket costs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing tele-mental health services and availability of affordable generic SSRIs
